items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario 'Conflict resolution when agents collide', but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how this scenario is handled or tested within the system. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide any relevant information or outcomes related to this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status. Without specific traces or snapshots that confirm the expected behavior, the requirement cannot be assessed.
